raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX I discovered XXXX fraudulent transactions on my credit card bill, all of the charges were from XXXX I notified XXXX Credit Card Customer Service at Citibank of the XXXX charges. They took the information and said not to contact XXXX. The charges are listed as in dispute on my account. 
The charges are : XXXX XXXX {$3800.00}, XXXX XXXX {$3400.00}, XXXX XXXX {$3300.00}, XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX, XXXX {$4200.00} These charges total {$18000.00} in fraudulent charges. 
I have several credit cards with CitiBank, I have received calls and texts on the other cards in the past whenever Citi thought there was a suspicious transaction. 
For these transactions in XXXX with XXXX on the XXXX Credit card from Citibank, I did not receive any calls/text from Citi XXXX team that these were suspicious. 
XXXX Citibank customer service advised not to contact XXXX as Citibank was managing the investigation. 
I have notified the XXXX credit reporting bureaus for adding a fraud alert. I have frozen my credit reporting as well.
